overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character navigating a dystopian city street during an intense orange sandstorm at dusk. The camera moves through heavy atmospheric haze past swaying palm trees and massive elevated highways, transitioning from open construction areas to dark, covered underpasses with dramatic lighting shifts.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street adjacent to construction site during sandstorm

agents.ego_description: navigating forward through the stormy street, camera focused on distant construction cranes barely visible through orange haze

entered.detail: tall industrial cranes silhouetted against the orange storm clouds atop an unfinished building
high-rise building under construction with exposed framework visible through the haze
palm trees swaying in the storm wind lining both sides of the street
tall modern street lamps with dual fixtures extending over the roadway
low metal guardrails separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desolate urban street engulfed in an intense orange sandstorm. Construction cranes loom in the distance atop an unfinished high-rise, while palm trees sway violently in the wind. The camera moves steadily forward along a concrete sidewalk bordered by metal railings, with visibility severely limited by the thick atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined approach to elevated highway interchange

events.description: massive elevated highway overpass structure emerges from the orange haze ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the wind-swept path toward the looming highway infrastructure

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure with multiple support pillars spanning across the scene
elevated walkway crossing above the street with silhouetted figures visible on top
multi-story residential building with balconies visible through the storm

segments.scene_description: As the camera advances, the construction site recedes into the storm behind, replaced by the imposing silhouette of an elevated highway overpass. Palm trees line the path, their fronds whipping in the wind, while a pedestrian bridge becomes visible spanning the road ahead. The environment remains exposed to the harsh storm conditions with visibility continuing to be severely limited.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered area beneath elevated highway with parked vehicles

events.description: enters deep shadow beneath the elevated highway, significantly darker than open street
passes beneath the concrete overpass structure with vehicles parked along the right side

agents.ego_description: moving through the dimly lit underpass, passing rows of parked cars beneath the massive concrete structure

entered.detail: several vehicles parked along the curb beneath the overpass with headlights occasionally visible
massive support columns holding up the highway structure creating a corridor effect
staircase leading up to the pedestrian overpass visible in the distance
illuminated advertisement screen glowing through the haze on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the shadow of the elevated highway, where the orange storm light filters dimly through the structure above. Massive concrete pillars line the path, creating a corridor-like space with parked cars visible to the right. The environment becomes significantly darker and more enclosed, with a glowing billboard and concrete stairs visible ahead through the persistent haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway under highway with concrete stairs and debris

events.description: player character with red hair becomes visible in third-person view walking ahead

agents.ego_description: character with distinctive red hair walks steadily through the underpass toward the concrete stairs, viewed from behind

entered.detail: piles of garbage and debris accumulated against the wall under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to reveal the player character with red hair walking ahead through the underpass. The character approaches concrete stairs leading upward while navigating past trash piles accumulated against the walls. The elevated highway structure now looms to the left as the path continues deeper into the sheltered, dimly lit corridor beneath the urban infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, storm-swept urban street into the dark, sheltered depths of a massive highway underpass. It begins on a concrete sidewalk engulfed in an intense orange sandstorm, moving past violently swaying palm trees and distant construction cranes through a thick atmospheric haze. As the camera advances, the open construction site recedes and is replaced by the imposing silhouette of an elevated highway and a spanning pedestrian bridge. The scene then shifts into the shadow of the overpass, where the harsh orange light filters dimly through concrete pillars and parked cars to create a dark, enclosed corridor. Finally, the perspective reveals a red-haired character walking ahead through the haze, navigating past piles of trash toward concrete stairs as the path leads deeper beneath the urban infrastructure.
